title: Garden Trails
description: A lightweight plant-focused mod introducing new flora, silk production features and decorative potted plants
body:
# 🌱 Garden Trails A lightweight **plant-focused mod** introducing a variety of new flora, the **Silk Moth** and its unique silk crafting process, as well as decorative potted plants and upcoming iron pergolas and lattices with climbing plant support. This **vanilla-friendly mod** blends naturally into Minecraft and pairs especially well with [**Dawn of Time**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dawn-of-time). It combines **exploration and discovery** through new plants, with **creation and craftsmanship** around silk production — and more features to come in future updates.
![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Full-on compatibility We made sure the mod plays nice with these mods : * ✔️ **[Critters and Companions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/critters-and-companions)** : works with Silk & recipes for Silk Lead and Grappling Hook * ✔️ **[Let's Do Vinery](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-vinery)** : compatibility with grapes and red grapes, red grape bag recipe & red grape seeds from DoT grapes * ✔️ **[Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight)** : rice compatibility and bag of rice recipe * ✔️ **Farmland compatibility :** [Aether](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aether), Farmer's Delight, and [Immersive Weathering](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-weathering-forge) ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Features ### Plants * **11 new plants (with their wild versions):** Boxwood, Camellia, Commelina, Cypress, Geranium, Grapes, Ivy, Maize, Maple Sapling, Mulberry, Rice * **Silk feature:** Silk Moth entity, Drying Tray block, Stick Bundle block, Silk items (including silk itself!) * **8 potted plants:** Camellia, Commelina, Cypress, Geranium, Grapes, Maize, Maple Sapling, Mulberry ![Screenshots of the plants](https://i.imgur.com/BwvNdtr.png) ### Iron pergola block The pergola is back in a new formula : the iron pergola! This block is now going to handle the climbing plant feature we removed from wooden pergola in [Dawn of Time](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dawn-of-time). We decided to make it in iron to avoid the Everycompat variations multiplying the amount of blockstates (saturating the ram). The block got reworked and optimized! * The pergola support the Grapes, the Ivy and the Vines. Use the plant at the base of the pergola and let it grow! ![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/uHvKn7D.jpeg) ### How to obtain silk ? * Find the **mulberries** in the flowery forest or taiga. * When the mulberry is fully grown, there is a chance that a **Silk Moth** spawns. * Kill it to obtain **silk eggs** that you can hatch with mulberry leaves in the drying tray. _You can collect mulberry leaves by hitting the base of the plant._ ![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/NG4sY0u.gif) ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Upcoming Features * **Iron Pergola & Iron Lattice** with climbing plant support * **Color variants for Geraniums** * **Biome-adaptive foliage colors** (e.g., Cypress adapting like vanilla leaves) * **Bridge compatibility** between [Dawn of Time](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dawn-of-time) and [Armor of the Ages](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/armor-of-the-ages): shared crafting recipes using Garden Trails resources & cross-mod integration for items and plants * **Biome generation compatibility** for modded worlds (e.g., Biomes O’ Plenty, Terralith, etc.) ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Our mods
![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Credit * Development, models and textures by **Poulpinou** & **TheGoldenWorld**. * Thank you to **Knoxxturre** for the Maple tree. * [ChatGPT](https://openai.com/) has been used to wrap up this page in markdown. * [Retro Diffusion](https://www.retrodiffusion.ai/) has been used to generate the logo of this page and Poulpinou reworked it.
